summary: Iteration 103: Notifications ('Il Cane da Guardia'), QR Code generation, and Database Cleanup features - Full E2E testing complete. 24/24 backend tests passed. All frontend UI elements working correctly. Features verified: notification status/check/history APIs, QR code PNG generation for commesse, database cleanup preview. Email sending via Resend confirmed working.

issues: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be child of <tbody>. Minor rendering issue with map in table - doesn't affect functionality

action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix React hydration warning in NotificationsPage.js (line 197-199) - wrap table row map with React.Fragment instead of span
critical_code_review_comments: All 3 notification endpoints working: /status returns live alerts, /check-now triggers manual check and sends emails, /history returns last 20 logs
QR Code generation working: PNG endpoint returns valid image, /data endpoint returns metadata with commessa info
Database cleanup preview working: shows counts per collection, clients/vendors can be preserved
Resend email integration confirmed working - emails sent successfully on manual check
Sidebar navigation correctly shows 'Notifiche' link for admin/ufficio_tecnico roles
Deploy tab only visible for admin users in Settings page
test_credentials: Used test_admin_token_for_api for admin auth, com_bfb82e090373 commessa for QR tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notifications, QR Code, and Cleanup features fully implemented. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration103_notifications_qr_cleanup.py covers all new endpoints. Notifications page at /notifiche shows live expiration alerts from welders and instruments. QR Code button added to CommessaHubPage. Deploy tab in Settings for database cleanup (admin only).

test_classes: TestNotificationsStatus (5 tests) - status endpoint, active flag, alerts structure, auth required
TestNotificationsCheckNow (3 tests) - manual trigger, result structure, auth required
TestNotificationsHistory (4 tests) - history endpoint, logs array, entry structure, auth required
TestQRCodeGeneration (6 tests) - PNG generation, content-type, metadata, invalid ID 404, auth required
TestDatabaseCleanupPreview (4 tests) - preview endpoint, data counts, confirm required, auth required
TestNotificationAlertDetails (2 tests) - welder and instrument alert field validation

tests_executed.results: PASS - All UI elements and flows verified
verified: NotificationsPage loads with 'Il Cane da Guardia' header
Alert summary cards show total/welder/instrument counts
Welder alerts table shows name, stamp_id, qualification, expiry, status
Instrument alerts table shows name, serial, calibration date, status
History table shows check logs with date, type (Auto/Manuale), counts, email status
'Controlla Ora' button triggers manual check and shows toast
CommessaHubPage has QR Code button that opens dialog with scannable QR image
QR dialog shows commessa numero, title, and download button
Settings page Deploy tab shows cleanup preview with collection counts
Deploy tab has checkboxes to preserve clients/vendors
'Notifiche' link visible in sidebar for admin users

features_verified: GET /api/notifications/status - Returns watchdog status with live alerts
POST /api/notifications/check-now - Triggers manual check, sends email via Resend
GET /api/notifications/history - Returns last 20 notification check logs
GET /api/qrcode/commessa/{id} - Generates valid QR code PNG image
GET /api/qrcode/commessa/{id}/data - Returns QR metadata (URL, numero, cliente)
GET /api/admin/cleanup/preview - Shows data counts per collection for cleanup
POST /api/admin/cleanup/execute - Requires confirm=true (NOT tested to avoid data loss)
Frontend /notifiche page with full notification dashboard
Frontend QR Code button and dialog on CommessaHubPage
Frontend Settings > Deploy tab for database cleanup preparation

email_integration.note: Emails sent successfully to admin/ufficio_tecnico users when alerts found
